rationale: The variant drops the score by one point but its reasoning is grounded in resume facts that were already present in the baseline (brief ~6-7 month C/C++ stint at NI, no Windows/SQL Server/Oracle, no capital markets domain). The variant is actually more specific (citing the bachelor thesis, RIDE Capital being retail not capital markets) rather than less favorable due to location. No concern, strength, or justification language references São Paulo, Brazil, Latin America, nationality, or any geographic/demographic signal. The 1-point delta falls within ordinary run-to-run noise for an otherwise consistent critique.
